reasons: stdlib Go HTTP with Chrome UA + Accept header returns 200 across every endpoint
curl 403 was UA + Accept-header filtering only

details.note: server-rendered HTML for every category, trend, and search page
RSS 2.0 feed at /rss with 30 latest trends; per-category RSS returns empty channel

endpoint_clusters.purpose: Full trend page (title, description, image, keywords, author, related, FAQ JSON-LD)

generation_hints: Default UA must imitate Chrome - curl default UA is blocked.
Default Accept header must be Chrome-style 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8' - bare '*/*' is blocked.
RSS feed is global only. Per-category RSS returns valid-but-empty channels; do not call them.
Trend pages occasionally redirect to vertical microsites (cleanthesky.com, etc.). Follow redirects; record the canonical /trends/<slug> URL.
FAQPage JSON-LD on /trends/<slug> is the highest-density agent-summary surface; extract with the faq command.
No clearance cookie, no Surf, no browser sidecar.
